characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Ambiguously Bi: She's part of an official relationship with Chad, but has tons of subtext with Tawni. Attractive Bent-Gender: Tawni took an obsession with Eric, Sonny's fake number one fan, with Sonny in disguise as Eric. Aw, Look! They Really Do Love Each Other: She and Chad have at least one Aw Look moment an episode.After becomingan Official Couple. And they've "broken up" three times in the past three episodes. Yet it's been made very clear that they care about each other, and for every second that they snark at each other, there's another second or two where they are completely adorable. Bad Liar: Sonny is a terrible liar. When she lies, her voice usually goes up an octave, and she stammers. Belligerent Sexual Tension: With Chad. Sonny is definitely, with her tsuntsun sideonlytriggered by Chad and occasionally Tawny. As Chad was only introduced in the 2nd episode, Sonny and Tawni actually came first for this. As of the end of Season 1, it looks like some movement in the Chad/Sonny relationship is happening, a remarkably quickRelationship Upgradefor this type of couple (assuming they don't muck around for another season or 2 denying their obvious feelings for each other).

characters.name: Others
characters.description: Alpha Bitch: Emphisis on the Bitch. Big Bad: Of theSonny With A Secretstory arc. Disproportionate Retribution:When she finds out Sonny and Chad are in love, she sets out to ruin her career, reputation, and relationshipsandplots to assassinate her. When everyone finds out of her plans she still expects Chad to like her. When he rejects her, she leaves them die on an abandoned airplane. If I Can't Have You…:Leaves Chad to die after he rejects her. It's All About Me: To a sociopathic degree.
